meaning: n.微不足道的事物(或人),小人物,无,零,无价值之物
examples: I arrived in this country with zilch.
At the moment these shares are worth zilch.
They will tell you the answer: Zero, zilch, nada.
It even provides a modest 1.50% dividend yield, while its two leading rivals pay zilch.
Then Japanese stockholders will have gone a quarter-century with zilch for capital gains.
